reviews.comment:
Esta bien para descansar, hay mesitas y bancos. Se complica para comer algo, hay un servicio de cafetería. Y venta de artículos varios. Regular para la ruta

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place to rest; there are small tables and benches. It's difficult to find something to eat; there's a cafeteria and a variety of items for sale. Average for the route.

reviews.comment:
YPF con eso está todo dicho.
En el salón de ventas no compre nada pero necesitaba vasos y cucharas para darle unos medicamentos a mi hija más pequeña, me brindaron TODO y un poco más, la atención que me dieron parecía que fuéramos familia de las chicas del salón.
El playero reviso el auto cargó combustible y dió varias recomendaciones, erael mediodía y nos invitó a descansar a la sombra y que saliéramos más tarde de nuevo a la ruta.
Dónde si no es no es en YPF te pueden tratar así.
Cracks todos los trabajadores de esa estación de servicio.
Éxitos para todos ellos; salud y cosecha!!!

(Translated by Google)
YPF says it all.
I didn't buy anything in the service area, but I needed cups and spoons to give my youngest daughter some medicine. They provided everything and more. The service was so attentive, it was like we were family.
The attendant checked the car, filled the tank, and gave us several tips. It was midday, and he invited us to rest in the shade and come back later.
Where else but YPF can you be treated like this? All the workers at that station are fantastic! Best of luck to them all; may they have a bountiful harvest!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcUx1bDR3RRAB
